content.text: Added `flex gap-2` to the button container so the `OpenInV0Button` and restart button sit side by side horizontally at the top-right corner.
the open in v0 button is working properly, its issue is with how name is handled

content.text: The issue is that `ComponentPreview` receives `name` but doesn't pass it to `ComponentPreviewClient`, causing the URL to have `undefined` in
`ComponentPreview` now forwards `name` to `ComponentPreviewClient`, fixing the `undefined` in the v0 URL.
